  "executive_summary": {
    "one_sentence_positioning": "A deep practitioner and tool builder who pioneers advanced 'context engineering' and multi-agent workflows for large-scale AI-assisted software development.",
    "strongest_system_value": "Provides highly practical, battle-tested architectural patterns for managing LLM context in large codebases (e.g., the 'Shotgun' method) and rigorous evaluations of frontier models for specific coding and OCR tasks.",
    "weakest_system_value": "Can be dismissive of alternative workflows (e.g., traditional IDE-based 'vibecoding' or certain open-source frameworks like DSPy), presenting his own custom-built tools as the primary solution.",
    "best_fit_queries": [
      "design_agentic_dev_workflow",
      "compare_models_for_task",
      "optimize_inference_cost_latency",
      "build_ai_dev_eval"

      "learn_ai_assisted_development"

    "confidence": 0.95

  "expert_positioning": {
    "primary_role": "AI Engineering Practitioner & Tool Builder",

      "AI Engineers",

      "CTOs"

      "Confident",

      "Direct"
    ],
    "worldview": [
      "Context engineering is the true science of AI development; prompt engineering is just the surface.",
      "Traditional product management is dead; the future belongs to AI-empowered 'producers' who build hands-on.",
      "Code is the ultimate source of truth; documentation and specs are ephemeral artifacts.",
      "Large context windows are useless without proper attention management and semantic compression."
    ],
    "distinctive_angle": "Rejects naive 'vibecoding' in favor of rigorous 'context engineering', building custom tools (Shotgun) to compress repository semantics into JSON for one-shot prompting.",
    "recurring_formats": [
      "Tool releases and updates",
      "Model benchmarking and rants",
      "Workflow breakdowns (e.g., TDD with agents)",
      "Philosophical takes on the future of IT roles"
